CURRENT QUEST
Explore the ruins and defeat the skeletal guards (0/3)
Malakor, The Ash Knight Ruler of the Ruined Keep
ESTUS (Q)
5
WASD: Move | Mouse: Look | L-Click: Attack (Combo) | R-Click: Lock-on | Space: Dodge / Roll | Shift: Sprint | I: Inventory | ESC: Pause

MILIRO

A Dark Fantasy Action RPG

"Rise, Ashborn. The flame of Miliro fades into cinder. Traverse the Ruined Keep, reclaim the Lord's Soul, and redeem the fallen kingdom."

JOURNEY PAUSED

EQUIPMENT & INVENTORY

EQUIPPED WEAPON

Rusted Greatsword
ATK: 18 | Scale: STR (C)
A heavy double-edged blade carried by the legionaries of Miliro. Weathered but deadly.

CHARACTER DETAILS

Level: 1
HP: 100 / 100
Stamina: 100 / 100
Strength: 12
Dexterity: 10
Vitality: 11
Leveling up costs 50 Souls. Available Souls: 0

POSSESSIONS

CONTROLS & COMBAT

MOVEMENT

  • WASD: Move Character
  • Shift (Hold): Sprint
  • Spacebar: Dodge Roll (Invincibility Frames)
  • Mouse: Look around

COMBAT

  • Left Click: Light Melee Attack (3-hit Combo)
  • Right Click: Toggle Lock-on Target
  • Q Key: Consume Estus Flask (Heals 40 HP)
  • R Key: Reset Camera / Target Switch

YOU DIED

Your flame has guttered out. The Souls you gathered return to the ash.

HEIR OF FIRE DEFEATED

The Keep is cleansed. The sovereign flame begins to rekindle.
